channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hisense CanvasTV et DécoTV : des téléviseurs pensés comme des objets déco
item.description: Avec les modèles CanvasTV et DécoTV, Hisense renforce sa gamme de téléviseurs lifestyle en 2026, présentés comme des écrans capables de s’intégrer dans la décoration intérieure plutôt que de la dominer.

item.title: Ewan McGregor and Anne Hathaway’s Mystery’s Sci-Fi Film Has Its First Trailer
item.description: 'The End of Oak Street' is produced by J.J. Abrams and directed by 'It Follows' helmer David Robert Mitchell. It opens August 14.

item.title: Scientists Just Found the Salt Limit That Pushes Your Heart to the Breaking Point
item.description: Even a modest drop in daily sodium intake on a population level could prevent many new cases of heart failure, a new study finds.

item.title: White House Social Media Just Had Its Covfefe Moment
item.description: Is it just a troll or something more sinister?

item.title: Le RCS passe la quatrième : appels vidéo natifs et mise en forme, voici ce qui change pour vos messages
item.description: La GSMA vient de lever le voile sur le « Universal Profile 4.0 » du RCS. Au programme : l'arrivée tant attendue de la mise en forme du texte et, surtout, des appels vidéo totalement interopérables. On fait le point sur ces nouveautés.

item.title: I tried Microsoft OneDrive’s AI restyle feature, and now I know what I would look like as a crochet doll
item.description: Microsoft’s new OneDrive AI Restyle feature turns everyday photos into charmingly weird alternate versions

item.title: Hisense muscle son jeu mêlant le Mini LED et le RGB Mini LED en 2026
item.description: En 2026, chez Hisense, on va pouvoir compter sur trois familles de téléviseurs Mini LED et RGB Mini LED pour les TV les plus haut de gamme. Baptisées U7S Pro, UR8S et UR9S, ces séries s’insèrent juste en dessous de la série vitrine UX tout en cherchant à démocratiser le rétroéclairage RGB Mini LED face à la concurrence qui doit faire des annonces prochainement. ...

item.title: 3,3 millions de Français se désabonnent chaque mois d’une plateforme de streaming vidéo, mais qui est la grande perdante ?
item.description: Dans une étude, le site de partage de comptes Spliiit révèle que des millions de Français choisissent de quitter des services de SVOD tous les mois. Certains sont plus touchés que d'autres.

item.title: I should hate this camera but I’ve bought it several times — Kodak’s $35 retro keychain camera is so cheap you can’t go wrong
item.description: Retro in style and truly retro in quality (ahem), the Kodak Charmera is so bad that you have to love it, and so cheap and tiny that it's an easy gift.

item.title: Performances du MacBook Neo : la puce A18 Pro peut-elle rivaliser avec le M5 ?
item.description: Avant la publication de notre test du MacBook Neo, on se penche sur les performances de la puce A18 Pro de l'ordinateur portable accessible d'Apple. Et il ne faut pas forcément se fier aux apparences.

item.title: How to watch Wales vs Bosnia & Herzegovina: Free Streams, TV Info as Craig Bellamy's side look to take a step closer to the World Cup
item.description: Here’s how to watch Wales vs Bosnia and Herzegovina as they face off in the Path A World Cup qualifying semi-final.

item.title: How to watch Poland vs Albania: Free Streams & TV Channels for World Cup 2026 playoff qualifier
item.description: All the ways to watch Poland vs Albania live streams online – including for FREE – in the decisive World Cup 2026 playoff qualifier at Stadion Narodowy.

item.title: Italy vs Northern Ireland Free Streams: How to Watch 2026 World Cup PlayOff Semifinal From Anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Italy vs Northern Ireland in the 2026 World Cup playoffs for FREE, as Michael O'Neill's team seek an upset in Bergamo against the Azzurri.

item.title: Czechia vs Ireland free streams: How to watch 2026 World Cup playoffs, TV schedule, preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Czechia vs Republic of Ireland live streams online, including for FREE, with the winners advancing to the World Cup playoff final.

item.title: Govee’s color-changing smart lamps are on sale for up to 30 percent off
item.description: Speaking from experience, better lighting can completely change how a space feels. Over the years, I’ve filled my apartment with Govee’s color-changing lights, and they’ve made it feel calmer and more cheerful. That’s why it’s worth noting that a couple of its table lamps are on sale as part of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, including […]

item.title: This $450 Semi-Dumb Phone Is Barely Even a Phone
item.description: Meadow gives you some apps along with calls and texts, but don't plan on having a big contact list.

item.title: Great news for creators and professionals: This special code will slash the price on Intel’s Core i7 desktop processor with turbo speeds reaching up to 5.6GHz
item.description: Get Intel’s Core i7 desktop processor for just $340 using this promo code — a nearly $50 saving on a modern 20-core chip.

item.title: Google is launching Search Live globally
item.description: Search Live allows users to point their phone camera at objects to get real-time assistance, enabling back-and-forth conversations that draw on the visual context from the camera feed.

item.title: Hausse des prix de la RAM, délais rallongés et pénurie, tout comprendre de la crise de la RAM
item.description: Vous entendez partout sans peut-être réellement comprendre les enjeux. La mémoire RAM s'arrache à prix d'or en ce moment et certains acteurs délaissent même le marché grand public. Une situation qui concerne en premier lieu les PC, mais pourrait par capillarité atteindre tous les produits tech. On vous explique tout ce que vous devez savoir à propos de la crise de la RAM. ...

item.title: Yes, you really can save $60 on an Asus motherboard and get a free 512GB Team Group SSD worth $113 — a deal so good I refreshed the page to make sure it was real
item.description: Save $60 on this Asus motherboard and get a free 512GB Team Group SSD worth $113.

item.title: Startup Successfully Ignites World’s First Fusion Rocket
item.description: Space propulsion company Pulsar Fusion has achieved “first plasma” in its Sunbird nuclear fusion rocket, designed to propel rockets faster than any object has ever traveled.

item.title: Xbox Partner Preview live: the latest announcements from the showcase
item.description: Our live coverage of the latest Xbox Partner Preview.

item.title: Meta gets ready to launch two new Ray-Ban AI glasses
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. Meta and its AI glasses hardware partner EssilorLuxottica are getting ready to launch the next generation of their Ray-Ban AI glasses. That's according to a series of FCC filings for […]...

item.title: J’ai testé l’iPhone 17e : il est mieux, mais ce n’est pas le meilleur à acheter
item.description: L'iPhone 17e ne semble pas avoir changé. Pourtant, à y regarder de plus près, Apple a opéré quelques modifications bien senties et surtout sans augmenter son prix malgré la crise de la RAM.

item.title: These are the biggest risks businesses see around using AI - including the most 'extreme' threats
item.description: Businesses are rushing to implement AI, despite obvious risks to security.

item.title: Wikipedia interdit les articles générés par IA, mais pas tous ses usages
item.description: C'est officiel, Wikipedia ne veut pas d'articles générés par IA. L'encyclopédie en ligne a décidé de bannir l'utilisation de grands modèles de langage pour créer ou réécrire des articles. L'utilisation de la technologie IA n'est pas pour autant totalement prohibée.

item.title: Ce PC est un monstre de batterie selon les premiers tests, et ce n’est même pas un Mac
item.description: Le Dell XPS 16 2026, équipé de l'Intel Core Ultra 5 325, affiche une consommation d'énergie record, atteignant seulement 1,3 W en veille d'après les mesures de nos confrères. Ce modèle surpasse ses prédécesseurs avec près de 27 heures d'autonomie en usage continu grâce à une batterie de 70 Wh. L'efficacité énergétique améliorée pourrait prolonger la durabilité des PCs tout en répondant aux enjeux de réparabilité et de sobriété numérique....

item.title: How to watch World Cup 2026 Qualifying play-offs: Free Streams & TV Channels
item.description: All your free streams for World Cup 2026 Qualifying play-offs as 22 teams have to be whittled down to a final six.

item.title: Saros developer doesn't think Returnal 'was that hard of a game', but admits that the team 'did pay a lot more attention to the onboarding experience' for its spiritual successor
item.description: Housemarque has said it paid more attention to refining Saros' combat and the game's onboarding experience, admitting that its predecessor, Returnal, took a while to learn how to play.

item.title: Intercom's new post-trained Fin Apex 1.0 beats GPT-5.4 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 at customer service resolutions
item.description: Intercom is taking an unusual gamble for a legacy software company: building its own AI model.The 15-year-old, Dublin, Ireland-based massive customer service platform announced Fin Apex 1.0 on Thursday, a small, purpose-built AI model that the company claims outperforms leading frontier models from OpenAI and Anthropic on the metrics that matter most for customer support. The model powers Intercom's existing Fin AI agent, which already handles over one million customer conversations weekly.According to benchmarks shared with VentureBeat, Fin Apex 1.0 achieves a 73.1% resolution rate—the percen...

item.title: Pourquoi les voitures électriques à prolongateur d’autonomie n’ont pas de sens en Europe selon MG
item.description: En Chine, les électriques à prolongateur d'autonomie cartonnent. Voitures électriques le week-end, thermiques sur autoroute : le concept est séduisant sur le papier, mais se heurte pourtant à un obstacle réglementaire en Europe. MG vient d'expliquer pourquoi il ne compte pas investir l'Europe avec cette technologie.

item.title: Silicon Valley’s two biggest dramas have intersected: LiteLLM and Delve
item.description: LiteLLM offers an AI open source project used by millions that was infected by credential harvesting malware.

item.title: The Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 are 'excellent for runners' and they've dropped to their lowest price since Black Friday
item.description: Amazon slashes the price of the Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 in its Big Spring Sale – these top bone conduction headphones are now down to their best price since Black Friday.

item.title: Ni trop, ni trop peu : ce forfait 120 Go 5G à moins de 8 euros est un excellent compromis
item.description: Auchan Telecom est un opérateur virtuel spécialisé dans les forfaits sans engagement au très bon rapport data/prix. L'offre présentée aujourd'hui constitue d'ailleurs un excellent compromis pour profiter d'une enveloppe généreuse à un tarif abordable.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Live updates on Apple, Kindle, DJI, and Brooklinen deals
item.description: Get live updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: J’ai testé le Realme GT 8 Pro : un design audacieux au service d’une photo « de rue »
item.description: Le Realme GT 8 Pro vise à briser la monotonie ambiante avec une nouvelle stratégie basée sur un design audacieux et un partenariat photographique prestigieux avec RICOH GR.

item.title: Sony's new Dolby Atmos soundbar does all the things the Sonos Arc Ultra doesn't, for a lower price — and it's expandable for home theater like Sonos, too
item.description: Sony unveils the Bravia Theater Bar 5 and Bravia Theater Bar 7

item.title: A top AI researcher explains the limitations of current models
item.description: François Chollet talks about his deceptively simple new benchmark test for AI models. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here.

item.title: Humans Were Already Dog People 16,000 Years Ago, DNA Suggests
item.description: Some bones indicate that the hunter-gatherers of the time fed dogs fish. Their remains were also treated in similar ways to those of humans in death.

item.title: Sorry, my 'best budget mini PC' may be in the Amazon Spring Sale — but I can't recommend it when the M6 Ultra is discounted too
item.description: Let's be real - the M6 Ultra offers better value and performance than the G10 right now.

item.title: EU says Pornhub and others failed to stop minors accessing adult content
item.description: The European Commission (EC) accused four porn platforms of not doing enough to prevent minors from accessing their content. In its preliminary findings of a 10-month investigation, the European Union's regulatory arm said Pornhub, Stripchat, XNXX and XVideos have breached the Digital Services Act (DSA).The EC said the platforms have an ineffective “self-declaration“ measure — they only require users to make a single click to state they are over 18. Nor do efforts like content warnings, page blurring and "restricted to adults" labels "effectively prevent minors from accessing harmful content."...

item.title: Bad news skeptics - GitHub says it will employ user data to train its AI after all
item.description: Free, Pro and Pro+ GitHub users' data will all go into training Microsoft's AI models, but you can still opt out.

item.title: Want to upgrade your Philips Hue setup? Now's the time to do it — starting with this 5-star gadget that we called 'a seriously bright idea'
item.description: This affordable, palm-sized gadget 'revolutionized' our Homes Editor's smart-lighting setup

item.title: Fueling Creativity: The CFO’s Role
item.description: How a CFO who believes in the work can shape culture, talent, and growth in a creative business. There’s been a lot of noise in the advertising industry lately, from restructuring to consolidation to massive financial recalibrations at the industry’s biggest companies.

item.title: Denon Home 200, 400 et 600 : le renouveau des gammes d’enceintes multiroom avec Dolby Atmos Music
item.description: Denon renouvelle sa série Denon Home avec trois nouvelles enceintes sans fil haut de gamme, les Home 200, Home 400 et Home 600, pensées pour le multiroom et l’écoute immersive avec Dolby Atmos Music virtuel, en concurrence directe avec les systèmes Sonos ou les enceintes multiroom Wi-Fi d’autres grandes marques.

item.title: California Regulator Says Tesla’s ‘Robotaxis’ Are More Like a Limo in the Eyes of the Law
item.description: Tesla’s ride-sharing permit in the state means it doesn’t have to submit data on its operations.

item.title: Britain is building its tech empire on sand
item.description: Britain’s tech ambitions falter as developer burnout stifles innovation.

item.title: AMD's Ryzen 9950X3D2 chip features an incredible 208MB of on-chip cache
item.description:
AMD just revealed the Ryzen 9950X3D2 Dual Edition desktop processor, which is a beastly follow-up to last year's 9950X3D. This is the company's first desktop processor where both chiplets have been equipped with AMD's proprietary 3D V-Cache technology, which seems like a boon for gamers. Each chiplet includes 104MB of cache, offering an incredible 208MB total on-chip cache.
"208MB of cache means more game data, more assets and more working data sitting right next to the CPU cores," AMD Senior VP Jack Huynh explained in an announcement video. Just like last year's release, the 9950X3D2 feature...

item.title: AI Act : les Eurodéputés veulent repousser des échéances clés et interdire les IA générant les deepfakes sexuels
item.description: Le Parlement européen a voté pour reporter certaines dispositions clés de l'AI Act, le texte phare de l'Union européenne visant à réglementer l'intelligence artificielle. Le co-législateur européen propose aussi d'interdire les applications d'IA générant les deepfakes sexuels.

item.title: Red alert: Apples brand-new AirPods Max 2 are $19 off for Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon has the new Apple AirPods Max 2 marked down to $529.99 (normally $549) as of March 26, just one day after preorders opened.

item.title: Everyone hates Ticketmaster. Why’d Trump go easy on them?
item.description: Today on Decoder, we’re talking about the major antitrust lawsuit against Live Nation, and what it might mean for antitrust and competition law in general now that the Justice Department under Trump has decided to settle its part of the case. That’s even as many states — including New York, California, and Texas — carry […]

item.title: The ‘Tales from ’85’ Trailer Wants You Back in ‘Stranger Things’ Already
item.description: Netflix is sending us all back to Hawkins again starting April 23.

item.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
item.description: The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.

item.title: United States looks to ban federal use of Chinese robots
item.description: A couple of senators are planning to introduce a bill that would prohibit the U.S. government from buying or using Chinese robots.

item.title: Protection des mineurs : Bruxelles serre la vis contre Pornhub et Snapchat
item.description: Snapchat et les plus grands sites pornographiques sont dans le collimateur de la Commission européenne qui a décidé de tirer tous azimuts pour mieux protéger les mineurs sur internet.

item.title: The AI gap nobody's talking about
item.description: Despite AI’s rapid advancements, training resources on secure and efficient AI use are still limited.

item.title: AI is making better business everybody’s business
item.description: How AI is giving employees the tools to fix broken processes themselves.

item.title: We found the best iPad deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Save $200 on Apple tablets
item.description: Shop the best iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. One M3 iPad Air has never been cheaper.

item.title: A $20 Billion Crypto Scam Market Faces a New Government Crackdown
item.description: The Telegram-based Xinbi Guarantee black market sells services that help prop up scam operations. British officials just hit the highly lucrative marketplace with sweeping sanctions.

item.title: L’arrivée imminente des TV LG G6 fait chuter de 1 000 € le prix du LG OLED G5 4K 65″ 165 Hz noté 9/10
item.description: Le LG OLED65G55LW est un téléviseur très haut de gamme qui propose une dalle OLED evo pour régaler les amateurs de cinéma et de gaming sur un panneau très lumineux. Lancé à 2 699 euros, il anticipe la sortie des G6 pour passer à 1 699 euros sur PC Componentes.

item.title: The 30+ best kitchen deals we found in Amazons Big Spring Sale — shop Breville, Ninja, and Keurig
item.description: Ninja blenders, Breville espresso machines, and the Our Place air fryer make up some of the best Amazon spring sale kitchen deals.

item.title: Huge numbers of web stores are facing attack from this dangerous new malware
item.description: Hackers are actively using PolyShell against major brands and other ecommerce sites.
